name: @lebonfoin/mcp-server
description: MCP Server for LeBonFoin — French artisanal CBD marketplace. v1.6.0: UTM tracking on all outbound links (GA4-measurable funnel), aggregated producer statistics (anonymized listing), accurate teaser counts on local search. Search products, discover producers (geolocation), get CBD guides (FR/EN), query wiki encyclopedia, find local hemp farmers, debunk CBD myths, check legal status by EU country. Multilingual (FR + EN) on high-AEO tools.
